revisions.content:
# Auth plan

## Sync path
We hit the DB on every request, which is fine at low scale.

revisions.diff:
@@ -3,2 +3,2 @@
-We hit the DB on every request, which is fine at low scale.
+We hit the DB on every request for the sync path. For async we cache, so this holds past low scale.

anchor.quote: We hit the DB on every request
We hit the DB on every request
anchor.suffix: , which is fine at low scale.

thread.author: Sam
thread.body: Won't this fall over past 10k users?

thread.author: agent
thread.body: Agreed for the sync path. I split sync vs async and added caching for async. Updated in v2.

thread.author: Sam
thread.body: Overall solid. Add a section on rate limiting before we ship.
